description: Microsoft Defender Firewall helps secure users by determining which network traffic can be sent and received by their devices. Blocking unauthorized network traffic reduces the risk of network security threats and protects intellectual property.
userImpact: When Microsoft Defender Firewall is set up for your tenants, it helps prevent unauthorized incoming and outgoing traffic. It safeguards sensitive and intellectual property and reduces the risk of network security threats.

managementTemplateSteps.displayName: Configure a Microsoft Defender Firewall policy for Windows 10 and later
managementTemplateSteps.description: Microsoft Defender Firewall helps secure users by determining which network traffic can be sent and received by their devices. Blocking unauthorized network traffic reduces the risk of network security threats and protects intellectual property.
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: When Microsoft Defender Firewall is set up for your tenants, it helps prevent unauthorized incoming and outgoing traffic. It safeguards sensitive and intellectual property and reduces the risk of network security threats.

values: @sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm,microsoftSense' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"policyId")

@sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /[@sys.notexists("policyId")]beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"oldPolicyId")

@sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm,microsoftSense' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"policyId")
